General.Name: Semk Holdings International Ltd
General.Description: B.Duck Semk Holdings International Limited, an investment holding company, provides licensing and design consultation services in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Taiwan, Southeast Asia, Brazil, Latin America, and internationally. It operates through two segments: Character Licensing and E-Commerce and Other. The company offers merchandise licensing, location-based entertainment licensing, content and media licensing, and promotion licensing services. It is also involved in the trading of licensed brand products through online platforms and offline channels. B.Duck Semk Holdings International Limited has a strategic alliance with ZheJiang Haers Vacuum Containers Co.,Ltd. The company was formerly known as Semk Holdings International Limited and changed its name to B.Duck Semk Holdings International Limited in March 2023. B.Duck Semk Holdings International Limited was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. B.Duck Semk Holdings International Limited operates as a subsidiary of Semk Global Investment Ltd
General.Address: TML Tower, Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong

4.Name: Mr. Wa Pan  Chan
